channel.title: ossu/computer-science Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: ossu/computer-science Mar 20th, 2022
item.description:
Summary

  • Match the curricular standards of the CS 2013: Curriculum Guidelines for Undergraduate Degree Programs in Computer Science

item.title: ossu/computer-science Jul 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Team

  • Josh Hanson: lead technical maintainer
  • Waciuma Wanjohi: lead academic maintainer

item.title: ossu/computer-science Jul 17th, 2021
item.description:
Final project

Evaluation

  • Submit your project's information to PROJECTS via a pull request.
  • Put the OSSU-CS badge in the README of your repository!

item.title: ossu/computer-science Jan 18th, 2021
item.description:
Community

  • We have a discord server! This should be your first stop to talk with other OSSU students. Why don't you introduce yourself right now? Join the OSSU Discord

item.title: ossu/computer-science Dec 29th, 2020
item.description:
Community

  • You can also interact through GitHub issues. If there is a problem with a course, or a change needs to be made to the curriculum, this is the place to start the conversation. Read more here.

item.title: ossu/computer-science Nov 30th, 2020
item.description:
Community

  • Subscribe to our newsletter.

item.title: ossu/computer-science Sep 17th, 2020
item.description:
Prerequisites

  • Core CS assumes the student has already taken high school math, including algebra, geometry, and pre-calculus.

item.title: ossu/computer-science Jun 10th, 2020
item.description:
How to show your progress

  • Copy this board to your personal account.

item.title: ossu/computer-science May 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Summary

  • Run regularly (ideally in self-paced format, otherwise running multiple times per year)

item.title: ossu/computer-science Apr 14th, 2020
item.description:
Team

  • Eric Douglas: founder of OSSU

item.title: ossu/computer-science Mar 25th, 2020
item.description:
Community

  • Add Open Source Society University to your Linkedin profile!
  • Note: There is an unmaintained and deprecated firebase app that you might find when searching OSSU. You can safely ignore it. Read more in the FAQ.

item.title: ossu/computer-science Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Curriculum

  • Intro CS
    • Introduction to Programming
    • Introduction to Computer Science

item.title: ossu/computer-science Oct 31st, 2018
item.description:
Team

  • Contributors

item.title: ossu/computer-science Jul 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Congratulations

  • Pay attention to emerging technologies in the world of software development:
    • Explore the actor model through Elixir, a new functional programming language for the web based on the battle-tested Erlang Virtual Machine!
    • Explore borrowing and lifetimes through Rust, a systems language which achieves memory- and thread-safety without a garbage collector!
    • Explore dependent type systems through Idris, a new Haskell-inspired language with unprecedented support for type-driven development.

item.title: ossu/computer-science Apr 11th, 2017
item.description:
Congratulations

  • Join a local developer meetup (e.g. via meetup.com).

item.title: ossu/computer-science Mar 5th, 2017
item.description:
Summary

  • Be open for enrollment
  • Be of generally high quality in teaching materials and pedagogical principles

    • Curriculum

  • Prerequisites

    • Prerequisites

  • Advanced CS assumes the student has already taken the entirety of Core CS

item.title: ossu/computer-science Mar 1st, 2017
item.description:
Congratulations

  • Look for a job as a developer!
  • Check out the readings for classic books you can read that will sharpen your skills and expand your knowledge.

item.title: ossu/computer-science Feb 25th, 2017
item.description:
Curriculum

  • Advanced CS
    • Advanced programming
    • Advanced systems
    • Advanced theory
    • Advanced information security
    • Advanced math

item.title: ossu/computer-science Feb 19th, 2017
item.description:
Curriculum

  • Final project
  • Core CS
    • Core programming
    • Core math
    • CS Tools
    • Core systems
    • Core theory
    • Core security
    • Core applications
    • Core ethics

item.title: ossu/computer-science Oct 9th, 2016
item.description:
How to show your progress

  • Create an account in Trello.
